use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and dialogs
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and compact UI areas
Multi-variant button system for different action priorities
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition via asChild prop and class-variance-authority for scalable variant management. Features standard focus states, hover effects, disabled states, and shadow styling for depth.
